name: SBI Card PULSE
exclusions: transactions excluded under SBI Card reward terms
milestoneBenefits: Renewal fee waiver on annual spends of Rs 2 lakh
Rs 1,500 voucher on annual retail spends of Rs 4 lakh
additionalBenefits: Noise ColorFit Pulse 4 Pro worth Rs 7,999 on payment of joining fee
1 year complimentary FITPASS PRO membership subject to joining fee payment and minimum one retail transaction
1 year complimentary Netmeds First membership subject to joining fee payment and minimum one retail transaction
10 Reward Points per Rs 100 spent on chemist, pharmacy, sports, dining and movies
2 Reward Points per Rs 100 spent on all other spends
4 domestic lounge accesses per year, capped at 1 per quarter
Complimentary Priority Pass membership for first two membership years, with no complimentary visits
Fraud liability cover of Rs 1 lakh
1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions from Rs 500 to Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 250 per statement cycle
